content.en:
Ye Tian browsed the memories of the Dark Mist Lord, and only browsed the memories he wanted, and soon knew the location of the Infinite Sea.

Actually, the Infinite Sea is not very far from the Source Sea, but if you want to get to the Infinite Sea, you need to pass through two dangerous places.

Purple Aurora Domain, a dark barrier.

The Purple Aurora Domain is a special zone in the Void Region, that area is completely covered by a purple light, it is a forbidden area, even the Void Beast does not dare to enter there, because there is no strength of the Legendary Realm Lord, once it enters the Purple Aurora Domain, it will be assimilated by the power of the Purple Aurora and become a part of the Purple Aurora Domain.

Moreover, the Legendary Realm Lord can enter the Purple Aurora Light Domain without dying, but it will also be suppressed, because in the Purple Aurora Light Domain, the speed of the Legendary Realm Lord will be very slow and slow, and once he enters the Purple Aurora Light Domain, he will not be able to find the direction at all, and he doesn't know how long he needs to fly to pass through the Purple Aurora Light Domain.

In the face of the unknown, those Legendary Realm Lords in the space-time territory once tried to pass through the Purple Aurora Light Domain, but in the end they didn't stick to it, or they didn't find the right direction, so they gave up, after all, there was no chance in the Purple Aurora Light Domain, and it was not worth their exploration.

If you pass through the Purple Aurora Domain and find the right direction, you can enter another void area, and if you fly a distance, you can reach the Dark Barrier, which is an endless barrier formed entirely by dark power, and if you don't have enough strength, you can't break the Dark Barrier at all, and you can't continue to move forward.

Basically, the Legendary Realm Lord has the strength to break through the dark barrier and enter another area.

Through these two places, you can reach the Void Area where the Infinite Sea is located, and when you get there, it will be easy to fly to the Infinite Sea~.

The six Legendary Lords of the Source Sea had not completely flown through the Purple Aurora Domain from beginning to end, because they didn't know, otherwise they would have tried to fly through the Purple Aurora Region at all costs.

Now that Ye Tian knew this secret, it would be easy to find the Infinite Sea.

"At the beginning, the Dark Mist Lord was probably desperate to escape from this area, broke into the Purple Aurora Light Domain, accidentally passed through the Purple Aurora Light Domain, and then passed through the Dark Barrier, and then found the Infinite Sea!" Ye Tian muttered.

Other than that.

From the memory of the Lord of the Dark Mist, he found that the Lord of the Dark Mist was not caught as soon as he entered the Infinite Sea, but lived in the Infinite Sea for a period of time before he was accidentally caught by Qin Yu, and the Lord of the Dark Mist also had a certain understanding of the Infinite Sea.

For example, the general situation of the Infinite Sea, and the strength of the Qin family.

The Qin family is a top force in the Infinite Sea, with a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, three Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords, six Realm Legendary Lords, and more than a dozen Perfection Realm Legendary Lords, as for the Initial Realm Legendary Lords, the Qin family has even more numbers.

And Qin Yu is highly valued in the Qin family, so he will be given an eternal treasure.

The Eternal Treasure is not only extremely precious to Qin Yu, but also very important to the Qin family.

It can be said that the Qin family can't just forget it, and it will inevitably come to seize the eternal treasure.

At that time, it will be Qin Yu who will come, but the Qin family's Realm Legendary Lord, and it may even be a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord.

No matter how strong Ye Tian's strength was, he couldn't compete with the Qin family's powerhouse.

Of course, Ye Tian also has a few options.

First, leaving Yuanhai, neither the Qin family nor Qin Yu could find him.

Second, find a backer, so that the Qin family is extremely jealous, so that they can't deal with him.

At this time, Ye Tian thought of a powerful place that was really unholy land!

The True Infinite Holy Land is the power that is truly at the peak of the Infinite Sea, far from being comparable to the Qin family.

Before, Ye Tian had learned about the True No Holy Land from the prisoners of Moshan, but that was a long time ago, and now he had also found out about the True No Holy Land from the memories of the Dark Mist Lord, because the Dark Mist Lord had also specially inquired about the True No Holy Land.

Today's True Nothing Holy Land really doesn't have its original glory, because a great war broke out in the Infinite Sea a long time ago, and the True Nothing Holy Land is also one of them, and many forces perished in that battle, although the True Nothing Holy Land did not perish, but the losses were also very heavy, and the Legendary Realm Lord alone fell five

But even so, the True Infinite Holy Land was still the top peak force of the Infinite Sea.

However, since that war, the True No Holy Land has not accepted many members, and the requirements are much higher, and the requirements for joining the True No Holy Land are very high.

"I have also gained a lot of benefits in the ruins of the True Nothing Holy Land before, maybe I have a relationship with the True Nothing Holy Land, but I can join this force, I know from the memories of the Dark Mist Lord, the Infinite Sea has connections with many powerful Eternal Seas, and there are also other Legendary Realm Lords of the Eternal Sea who have joined the forces of the Infinite Sea, so I am also qualified to join the True Nothing Holy Land. Ye Tian said darkly.

Flying directly from the Source Sea to the Infinite Sea, the speed was too slow, maybe when he arrived at the Infinite Sea, the powerhouses of the Qin family had already come to the Source Sea, and it would be too late.

Then there's only one way.

"The Plane Staircase must be built!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Ladder of Time and Space is a way for the Infinite Sea to reach other Eternal Seas, using the Eternal Arcana to superimpose layers of time and space, and then using the secret technique of the Ladder of Time and Space to construct a ladder passage that can lead to other Eternal Seas.

.0.......

And Ye Tian now knows the space-time location of the Void Region of the Infinite Sea, and now that he is in the Source Sea, he can naturally calculate the location of the Source Sea.

The Dark Mist Lord had accidentally broken into the Infinite Sea before, he didn't know the location of the Source Sea in the space-time of the Void Region at all, after all, this thing was an invention of the Infinite Sea, and he could only calculate it slowly after coming back, otherwise, he could directly help Qin Yu build the space-time ladder in the first place.

"The Lord of the Dark Mist and Qin Yu are really my chances, if it weren't for them, where would I know the location of the Infinite Sea, and where would I know the time and space ladder. "

The Ladder of Time and Space is the secret technique of the Rotten Street in the Infinite Sea, and the only problem is the Eternal Treasure, which is very rare. Not many Legendary Realm Lords have it, but Ye Tian has it, and there is more than one, so he can build the Ladder of Time and Space.

On the other side, after Ye Tian took the Eternal Supreme Treasure Fire Domain Sword from Qin Yu, he immediately killed Qin Yu and immediately began to build the space-time ladder.

Immeasurable Sea, Qin family.

Qin Yu immediately sensed that his doppelganger had fallen, and he was immediately furious.

He knew that his Eternal Supreme Treasure Fire Domain Sword had been completely taken away by Ye Tian, so he was not going to hide it, and he had to inform the Qin family elders that even if he was punished, contributing to the position of a strange Eternal Sea was enough to make up for his mistakes, and even had great merit!

So, he came to the main hall of the Qin family and asked to see the ancestor of the Qin family. _
